Build a patient portal API. Show upcoming appointments, recent lab results, and medication list at /dashboard.
Build a stock portfolio tracker. GET /portfolio returns holdings, P&L, and recent trades.
Build a social feed API. Show recent posts from friends, trending hashtags, and unread notifications at /feed.
Build a task management backend. GET /tasks returns open tasks, due dates, and project progress.
Build a classroom dashboard API. Show course schedule, grades, and upcoming assignments at /student.
Build a game leaderboard service. GET /leaderboard returns top players, scores, and recent matches.
Build a product catalog API. Show featured items, inventory levels, and bestsellers at /products.
Build a delivery tracking system. GET /tracking returns package status, estimated arrival, and driver location.
Build a property listing API. Show available homes, price trends, and open house dates at /listings.
Build a dating profile viewer. GET /matches returns nearby users, compatibility score, and mutual interests.
Build a workout log API. Show recent sessions, personal bests, and weekly streak at /fitness.
Build a civic info endpoint. GET /civic returns upcoming elections, local representatives, and ballot measures.
Build a news aggregator API. Show top headlines, trending topics, and breaking alerts at /news.
Build a music discovery service. GET /discover returns new releases, top charts, and recommended playlists.
Build a video trending API. Show popular clips, viral tags, and creator stats at /trending.
Build a travel itinerary backend. GET /itinerary returns upcoming trips, flight info, and hotel bookings.
Build a scheduling availability API. Show open time slots, upcoming meetings, and calendar sync at /availability.
Build a ticketing system API. GET /events returns upcoming shows, ticket availability, and venue details.
Build a marketplace listings API. Show active listings, recent sales, and top categories at /marketplace.
Build a subscription analytics backend. GET /metrics returns active subscribers, churn rate, and MRR.
